title: Register providers as a config table not hardcoded branches
description: Each provider is its own if(KEY) branch, its own signal, its own block. A 4th provider requires touching 4+ places. Replace with a PROVIDERS config array that pollAll iterates and ProviderCard renders from.

title: Collapse duplicated poll block in pollAll()
description: pollAll() in src/index.tsx repeats the same loading→fetch→calcRates→setSignal pattern 3 times. Adding a 4th provider means copy-pasting again. Extract a single pollProvider(fetcher, setter) helper so pollAll becomes 3 declarative lines and the error/rate logic has one home.

title: Move Number() coercion from calcRates into fetchers
description: calcRates coerces spend/creditsUsed with Number() because APIs return strings. Fetchers own the API boundary and should normalize to number there. calcRates should receive clean numbers.

title: Extract fetchJson helper to DRY up HTTP error handling in fetchers
description: All 3 provider fetchers repeat the same if (!res.ok) error pattern. Extract a fetchJson<T> helper that handles the error path once.

title: Extract pure rate/time logic out of store.ts
description: hoursElapsedToday and calcRates are pure functions with no SolidJS dependency but live alongside reactive signals in store.ts. Move to src/rates.ts so they can be imported and tested without any framework context.

title: Rename store.test.ts to rates.test.ts
description: store.test.ts tests hoursElapsedToday and calcRates which live in rates.ts. Filename lies. Rename to rates.test.ts.

title: Collapse thin store.ts into rates.ts
description: store.ts is only 3 signal declarations and a type re-export. No logic. Collapse into rates.ts which is the real domain module, or index.tsx.

title: Collapse providers/types.ts into store.ts
description: providers/types.ts exports only ProviderResult — a single-type file where interface complexity equals file complexity. Move ProviderResult into store.ts which already owns ProviderState, eliminating the pass-through file.

title: Delete dead RateTracker module
description: RateTracker.ts is fully tested but never imported anywhere. It creates confusion about which rate model is canonical (calcRates in store.ts is the live one). Delete the class and its tests, record the decision.
